title: ‘Hamilton’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Lin-Manuel Miranda
fact: Hamilton: An American Musical is a sung-and-rapped-through biographical musical with music, lyrics, and a book by Lin-Manuel Miranda.

title: ‘The Book of Mormon’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Matt Stone
fact: The Book of Mormon is an American musical comedy with music, lyrics, and book by Trey Parker, Robert Lopez, and Matt Stone.

title: ‘Cabaret’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by John Kander
fact: Cabaret is an American musical with music by John Kander, lyrics by Fred Ebb, and a book by Joe Masteroff.

title: ‘The Phantom of the Opera’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: The Phantom of the Opera is a musical with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber, lyrics by Charles Hart, additional lyrics by Richard Stilgoe, and a libretto by Lloyd Webber and Stilgoe.

title: ‘Jesus Christ Superstar’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: Jesus Christ Superstar is a sung-through rock opera with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber and lyrics by Tim Rice.

title: ‘Les Misérables’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Claude-Michel Schönberg
fact: Les Misérables, colloquially known as Les Mis or Les Miz, is a sung-through musical with music by Claude-Michel Schönberg, lyrics by Alain Boublil and Jean-Marc Natel, and a book by Boublil and Schönberg, based on the 1862 novel of the same name by Victor Hugo.

title: ‘Wicked’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Stephen Schwartz
fact: Wicked is a musical with music and lyrics by Stephen Schwartz and a book by Winnie Holzman.

title: ‘Harry Potter and the Cursed Child’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Imogen Heap
fact: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child is a play written by Jack Thorne from an original story by Thorne, J.

title: ‘Chicago’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by John Kander
fact: Chicago is an American musical with music by John Kander, lyrics by Fred Ebb, and book by Ebb and Bob Fosse.

title: ‘West Side Story’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Leonard Bernstein
fact: West Side Story is a musical conceived by Jerome Robbins with music by Leonard Bernstein, lyrics by Stephen Sondheim, and a book by Arthur Laurents.

title: ‘Chess’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Benny Andersson
fact: Chess is a musical with music by Benny Andersson and Björn Ulvaeus of the pop group ABBA, lyrics by Ulvaeus and Tim Rice, and book by Rice.

title: ‘Cats’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Andrew Lloyd Webber
fact: Cats is a sung-through musical with music by Andrew Lloyd Webber.

title: ‘Miss Saigon’ premieres
subtitle: Musical by Claude-Michel Schönberg
fact: Miss Saigon is a sung-through stage musical by Claude-Michel Schönberg and Alain Boublil, with lyrics by Boublil and Richard Maltby Jr.
